rag_rules: Repair AGREE diagnostics by resolving unresolved identifiers in implementation-level assignments, not by adding new architecture.
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE equations or assignments are visible AADL features or locally declared helpers within the same annex.
generic_rules: Fix type mismatches by validating that all operands in comparisons are of compatible scalar types (int, real, bool).
Prefer deleting invalid clauses over introducing new components or connections to resolve validator errors.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use only 'int', 'real', 'bool' as scalar types in AGREE declarations.
Assignments in implementation annexes must target existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or data types not declared in the model or its dependencies.
Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scopes; use assign for implementation-level bindings only.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE assume/guarantee placement in type scopes
model fusion or owner scope changes
